111001100100011010000001010101101101111 - ASI: 20

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  101 = 10 * 1
  111 = 1 * 11
  0010 = 00 * 10
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1101 = 1 * 101
  11100 = 111 * 00
  000010 = 00 * 0010
  101111 = 101 * 111
  110010 = 11 * 0010
  110100 = 1101 * 00
  00110100 = 00 * 110100
  0000101010 = 000010 * 1010
  1101101111 = 1101 * 101111
  11100110010 = 11100 * 110010
  1110011001000110100 = 11100110010 * 00110100
  00001010101101101111 = 0000101010 * 1101101111
  111001100100011010000001010101101101111 = 1110011001000110100 * 00001010101101101111
